ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "price_tax_excl" REAL /* Price of the product excluding tax */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Tax rate applicable to the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the product was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the supplier */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the supplier was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the supplier was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Company name of the customer */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax ID of the customer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the customer was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the customer was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping method used */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date of the order */,
  "date_shipped" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "date_delivered" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the order */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the order was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the order was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_shipping_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_method_id") REFERENCES shipping_methods ("shipping_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the product */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the order item was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the order item was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory level was last updated */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the inventory entry was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the inventory entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID for the payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the payment was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the payment was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the invoice is for */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., pending, paid, overdue) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the invoice */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the invoice was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the invoice was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the category was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_methods" (
  "shipping_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shipping method */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the shipping method */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the shipping method was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the shipping method was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the user role was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the user role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the user was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the user was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the permission was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the role permission was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date the role permission was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)
